title: Data Retention Policy
body: Data Retention Policy: All customer data must be retained in accordance with applicable regulations. Current retention period: subject to periodic review. Please refer to the latest compliance guidelines.

title: Security Incident Response Plan
body: This document outlines the step-by-step process for responding to security incidents. All staff must be familiar with the escalation matrix and reporting timelines.

title: Business Continuity Plan
body: The Business Continuity Plan ensures critical operations can continue during disruptions. Key RTOs and RPOs are defined for each service tier.
